title: Translations. -Knowledge. (From Schiller.)
content:
In these epigrams I have altered the form, which in the original is the elegiac distich.


    To this man, 'tis a goddess tall,
     Who lifts a star-encircled head;
    To that, a fine cow in a stall,
     Which gives him butter to his bread.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, George MacDonald delivers a powerful performance in "Translations. -Knowledge. (From Schiller.)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
